metadata.notes: NL injury tracker. Community-maintained MLB injury database. Contributions welcome via PR.

players.name: Ronald Acuña Jr.

injuries.details: Tore right ACL before 2021 All-Star break. Surgery and missed rest of 2021 and most of 2022.
Tore left ACL in Pittsburgh game. Surgery and rehab through 2024-2025. Two surgically repaired knees impact speed and base-stealing.
Not ready for Opening Day 2025. First game back May 23 vs Padres — homered on first pitch after 362 days.
Late scratch from weightlifting discomfort. Next day hit leadoff HR. Cleared for All-Star Game.
Grade 1 strain in game vs Rockies at Coors Field. 10-day IL. Reinstated Aug 15.
Brief IL stint in late Aug after returning from hamstring.
7-game hitless stretch in Sept. Moved from leadoff to 6th/7th by Snitker. Manager friction. Yankees trade interest reported (no active talks per GM).

players.season_stats_2025: .252/.362/.378; .331+ and 1.011 OPS over 43 games post-knee return
